title: Test coverage 68% — error branches unexercised
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.68; handlers.go 500-paths, invalid-JSON, and non-numeric-id branches (e.g. handlers.go:64,90 parseID error) have no test
suggestion: Add tests for invalid JSON body and non-numeric {id} to cover the 400 error paths

title: No request body size limit on POST/PUT
evidence: handlers.go:40 json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode reads unbounded body; no http.MaxBytesReader
suggestion: Wrap r.Body with http.MaxBytesReader to bound request size

title: go.mod Go version (1.26.4) disagrees with README (1.22+)
evidence: go.mod:3 `go 1.26.4`; README.md Requirements section says `Go 1.22 or later`
suggestion: Reconcile the declared Go version — the routing uses 1.22+ ServeMux patterns, so lower the go.mod directive or update the README

title: List endpoint has no pagination
evidence: handlers.go:61 handleListBooks returns full collection; store.go:List has no LIMIT/OFFSET
suggestion: Not required by spec; note for scale — add ?limit/?offset if collections grow

title: PUT requires full book; no partial (PATCH) update
evidence: handlers.go:98 handleUpdateBook re-validates and overwrites all fields via store.go:Update
suggestion: Not required by spec; consider PATCH semantics if partial updates are desired
